name: User
description: User within a customer. Has Email, Name, ResetPhone, PhoneCode, DefaultRoles, ProfilesUserCanAccess. Can be soft-deleted (IsDeleted flag) and reactivated.

name: CustomerUserRoleMapping
description: Maps which UserRoles users of a customer can be assigned by default. Configurable per customer by SuperAdmin.

name: CustomerLog
description: Admin log/note entry per customer. Has Id, DateInsertedUTC, text. Used for customer administration audit trail.

name: UserRoleAccess
description: Aggregated read model: which UserRoles a given user has access to (HasAccess flag). Driven by CustomerUserRoleMapping + PermissionService.

name: ProfileRole
description: Profile roles available on a customer. Read-only within customer_administration scope. Has Id and Name.
